evals.prompt: Generate a combined viewer link for my two objects so I can see them together.
evals.expected_output: A combined Evo Viewer URL is returned that includes both objects, along with individual portal links for each object.

evals.prompt: Show me the portal link for the EOV Test Block Model.
evals.expected_output: A portal URL is returned for the specified block model object.

evals.prompt: Generate viewer links without specifying any object IDs.
evals.expected_output: The request fails with a validation error indicating that at least one object ID must be provided.

evals.prompt: I want to see my variogram model in the Evo Viewer — can you give me a link?
evals.expected_output: The system explains that variograms are not supported in the Evo Viewer and directs the user to use the variogram-management skill for plotly-based 3D ellipsoid and 2D curve visualization.

evals.prompt: Show me my EOV Test Block Model and my variogram together — I want to see them side by side.
evals.expected_output: The system generates an Evo Viewer link for the block model and explains that the variogram cannot be shown in the Viewer. It directs the user to the variogram-management skill for plotly-based variogram visualisation alongside the Viewer link for the block model.
